runners.formComment: Strong performance to win by half a length at this track over 300m (16.82) beating Banjo's Clancy in Maiden on April 6. Was strong in the market and scored a soft win most recently. Stay with him.

runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 2nd on April 9 over 350m at this track behind Regal Gypsy beaten 6 lengths (19.28) in a Maiden. Some good form is emerging from that last run. Expected to prove hard to beat.
